chapters.title: One Piece
chapters.summary: 'Nerona Imu Descends' — Imu's true form and face are revealed for the first time as they arrive in Elbaf. The Five Elders try to prevent Imu from leaving the Holy Land, but Imu descends with overwhelming power, surrounding Aurust Castle with black flames. Next chapter 1180 expected April 19, 2026.

chapters.title: Nano Machine
chapters.summary: Ongoing weekly manhwa serialization continues. Cheon Yeon-woon's journey of growth through his nano machine abilities and martial arts mastery advances with a new confrontation.

chapters.title: Solo Leveling: Ragnarok
chapters.summary: Series on hiatus since January 2026 after illustrator JIN departed for mandatory military service. Expected to return around May/June 2026 with a new artist from Redice Studios.

chapters.title: Dandadan
chapters.summary: During a group outing, Okarun suggests meeting up with Momo and Jiji. Jiji reveals he has been secretly channeling ki into Momo to ease her chest pain, deepening the relationship dynamics between the main characters.

chapters.title: Blue Lock
chapters.summary: Barou uses Karasu's strategy to devour Shidou and scores for Japan, declaring himself the new king of Blue Lock. France's coach Rodin challenges Loki and Hugo, announcing a shift to a more aggressive strategy. Chapter 343 releases April 14, 2026.

chapters.title: Sakamoto Days
chapters.summary: Latest chapter released April 12, 2026. Weekly serialization continues in Weekly Shonen Jump.

chapters.title: Jujutsu Kaisen
chapters.summary: Main series concluded with final chapter 'From Now On'. The sequel manga 'Jujutsu Kaisen Modulo' also reached its final chapter (Ch.25) on March 8, 2026.

chapters.title: Chainsaw Man
chapters.summary: Series concluded with Chapter 232, ending the Academy Saga (Part 2). Final Volume 24 releases June 4, 2026.

chapters.title: Tower of God
chapters.summary: Season 3 Finale. Main series on hiatus since February 2025. Spin-off 'Urek Mazino' ongoing with Chapter 58 as of April 2026.

chapters.title: Spy x Family
chapters.summary: Chapter 132 released April 12, 2026. Biweekly serialization in Shonen Jump+ continues.

chapters.title: Frieren: Beyond Journey's End
chapters.summary: On indefinite hiatus since October 2025 due to health concerns for creators Yamada and Abe. No confirmed return date.

chapters.title: Omniscient Reader's Viewpoint
chapters.summary: Ongoing weekly manhwa serialization continues. Chapter 306 released April 8, 2026.

chapters.title: Eleceed
chapters.summary: Chapter 'Shadows' focuses on Jiwoo's training with Kartein, learning to incorporate healing mana into his electrical strikes to prevent physical recoil.

chapters.title: Kaiju No. 8
chapters.summary: Series completed with 129 chapters across 16 volumes. Anime 'Final Chapter' season by Production I.G is in production.

chapters.title: My Hero Academia
chapters.summary: Series concluded with Chapter 430 plus a bonus epilogue Chapter 431 in the final volume, showing the characters' futures years after the final battle.

chapters.title: Vinland Saga
chapters.summary: Series concluded with final chapter 'Somewhere Not Here', ending Thorfinn's journey after nearly 20 years of publication.

chapters.title: Kingdom
chapters.summary: 'Allies' Self-Sacrifice' — part of the Great War of Qin and Zhao Arc. Weekly serialization continues in Young Jump.

chapters.title: One Punch Man
chapters.summary: 'Life or Death' — Flashy Flash eliminates Heavy Smoker, surprising Tanktop Master. Tatsumaki faces emerging insect swarms after seemingly defeating Aggregation. Part of the Neo Heroes Uprising Arc.

chapters.title: WITCH WATCH
chapters.summary: Weekly serialization in Shonen Jump continues. Series has 25 volumes compiled as of March 2026.

chapters.title: Marriage Toxin
chapters.summary: Weekly serialization in Shonen Jump+ continues. Anime adaptation by Bones Film premiered April 7, 2026. Series has 17 tankōbon volumes with 1,000,000+ copies in circulation.
